subcodes.first_line: By the life of God! The books of the world have lamented, and the Lord of nations hath cried out, because of what hath befallen the Wronged One at the hands of every distant oppressor [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لعمر الله ناحت کتب العالم و صاح مولی الامم بما ورد علی المظلوم من کل ظالم بعید
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @call to action, @suffering and imprisonment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @spiritual transformation
